title: Media library
denied: You do not have permission to view the media library.
emptyDescription: Upload images or documents to use in your content and your theme.

uploader.hint: Drag files here, or pick them from your computer (20 MB per file at most).

picker.title: Choose a file from the library

errors.uploadDenied: You do not have permission to upload files.
errors.tooLarge: The file is larger than 20 MB.
errors.uploadFailed: The upload failed. Please try again.

noResultsDescription: Try a different search term, or clear the filter.

folders.title: Folders
folders.name: Name
folders.newDescription: Folders organise the library. A file keeps its URL wherever it is filed.
folders.editDescription: Renaming a folder changes nothing about the files inside it.
folders.deleteDescription: The files are not deleted — they move up one level and stay in the library.
folders.deleteSummary: This folder holds {files} files and {folders} subfolders. The subfolders go too; the files move up.

file.editDescription: Renaming or moving a file does not change its URL, so no published page breaks.
file.name: File name
file.altHint: What the image shows, for screen readers and search engines.
file.altPlaceholder: e.g. A red bicycle leaning on a wall
file.deleteDescription: “{name}” will be removed from the library.
file.deleteWarning: The library does not track which pages use a file. If a published page embeds this one, its image will go missing.

bulk.none: Select files to move or delete them together.
bulk.moveDescription: Filing only — the files keep their URLs, so nothing that embeds them breaks.
bulk.deleteDescription: {count} files will be removed from the library.
